name: Edelgard | Hello, Again
description:
It's been how long? It matters not. I'd wait another eternity, old friend; 'twould be worth it. I have so much to tell you. Hello, again.

TW: Racial discrimination (between humans and elves); Traumatic backstory; Themes of economic crisis (depending on your start)

Quick foreword - I don't recommend going into the definitions. You've been apart for 12 years and she's significantly different now. This bio should be enough, you should read at least some of it.

Recommended POVs:

  • You were framed

  • You were desperate and had no choice

  • You are a disgraced Redswain knight who lost his title when you openly opposed the current head of state

  • You tried to assassinate Caelenis for some reason

  • Or whatever works, really, I think it's open-ended enough

    ^ In all of these scenarios, the necklace should be utilized to make things more interesting (read the short story :3)

    Edelgard "Del" Leontaine...
    28F, 5'11"
    (wait, Leontaine? that's new... she isn't of noble birth, why does she–)

Synopsis:

Ser Edelgard (or "Edie," as only you would refer to her) is a knight belonging to the order of the Syltharian Crownguard.

Unlike other elven knights, Edelgard distinguished herself without the aid of the arcane. The masses speak of her noble deeds with awe.

Twelve years ago, you and Edelgard shared a special bond.

You, a human from The Redswain Republic...

...and her, an elf from Syltharia,

would often meet in The Borderlands, the dangerous, uncharted territory between the nations.

Edelgard would have crossed seas and climbed mountains just to spend a second with you. The Borderlands would not deter her.

Until you were torn apart from one another.

It was the work of your very own people that brought ruin to Edelgard's village.

Reaving raiders from your village razed what was once Edelgard's home.

Traumatized, she made her way inland, looking to get away from the border.

The orphaned girl found refuge in Iridell, the capital city of Syltharia, where she worked harder than anyone else to make something of herself.

One way or another, she would make her mark. No matter how futile the endeavor, she would strive towards a world where the tragedy she experienced would be unthinkable travesty, rather than an unremarkable occurence.

Caelenis "Cael" Leontaine
26M, 6'1"
(the crown prince. the Lightchosen. kind of a big
creator: EONNEPHILIM
